title: LobotomyCraft
description: A resource pack to make your Minecraft world a bit more Normal
body:
This amazing resource pack can help you experience the joys of Geometry Dash 2.2 within Minecraft: Java Edition! Best experienced with [Fast Better Grass](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fast-better-grass)

Features:

- Normal grass
- Normal sun and moon
- Normal leaves on all trees
- Authentic sounds when stepping on Normal
- Authentic fire SFX
- And more!

Don't forget to like and rate 3*
